stories.title: Fonseca Stuns Berrettini 6-3, 6-2 — First-Time Monte Carlo QF

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
João Fonseca just beat the guy who beat Medvedev 6-0, 6-0. Berrettini — who looked untouchable 24 hours ago — got taken apart 6-3, 6-2 in 75 minutes. The 19-year-old is in the Monte Carlo QF.

#MonteCarlo #Tennis

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Fonseca: first Brazilian Masters 1000 QF since 2011. Youngest at Monte Carlo's last 8 since Nadal and Gasquet in 2005. He's 19. He faces Zverev Friday.

#MonteCarlo #Tennis

article.headline: Fonseca Reaches Monte Carlo Quarterfinals, Eliminates Berrettini 6-3, 6-2

stories.title: Sinner's No. 1 Chase — 36 Sets, Machac R3 in Monte Carlo

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Jannik Sinner has won 36 consecutive sets at Masters 1000 events. Zero points to defend at Monte Carlo. Every win tightens the No. 1 gap on Alcaraz. R3 vs. Machac today.

#MonteCarlo #Tennis

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Sinner's 2026 Masters 1000 dominance in one stat: 36 straight sets without dropping one. Machac is up next — a 3-0 H2H deficit, first clay meeting. This is Sinner's title to win.

#MonteCarlo #Sinner

article.headline: Sinner's Monte Carlo No. 1 Chase: 36 Consecutive Sets and Everything to Gain

stories.title: Zverev Into Monte Carlo QF for First Time Since 2022

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
Zverev def. Bergs 6-2, 7-5. First Monte Carlo QF for Alexander Zverev since 2022. He'll face João Fonseca Friday. At his home tournament. Chasing his 8th Masters 1000 title.

#MonteCarlo #Tennis

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
The Monte Carlo QF bracket is taking shape. Fonseca vs. Zverev. 19 vs. experience. 75 minutes of clay brilliance vs. 8 Masters 1000 titles. Friday can't come soon enough.

#MonteCarlo #Tennis

article.headline: Zverev Into Monte Carlo Quarterfinals for First Time Since 2022, Faces Fonseca on Friday

stories.title: Alcaraz vs. Etcheverry R3 — Title Defense with an Honest Admission

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Alcaraz after his Monte Carlo opener: "I expect to lose No. 1 to Sinner." He's still 18-2 for the season. He defends 1,000 points today against Etcheverry. R3 is on Court Rainier III.

#MonteCarlo #Tennis

article.headline: Alcaraz Defends Monte Carlo Title with Honest Admission: "I Expect to Lose No. 1 to Sinner"

stories.title: WTA Stuttgart Preview — Sabalenka Seeks to Break Stuttgart Curse

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Stuttgart starts Monday. Sabalenka is the No. 1 seed — and has lost 4 Stuttgart finals without winning the title. Rybakina, Gauff, Swiatek all in the draw. Indoor clay. April 13–19.

#Stuttgart #WTATennis

article.headline: WTA Stuttgart 2026 Preview: Can Sabalenka Finally Win the Porsche Tennis Grand Prix?
